slight_left|medium|backtrack|failure_pat.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 38cm. Bearing was far_right. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

behind_right|close|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [behind_right, close] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -81cm (bad). Wrong: moving forward when bearing is behind_right increases distance. Turn first.

far_left|close|STOP|neutral.lesson: [far_left, close] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still close from goal.

slight_right|close|oscillation|failure_p.lesson: Oscillation detected: alternating turns without progress. Commit to one turn direction until bearing is within ±30°, then move forward.

aligned|medium|STOP|neutral.lesson: [aligned, medium] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still medium from goal.

far_right|close|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [far_right, close] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -33cm (bad). Wrong: moving forward when bearing is far_right increases distance. Turn first.

behind_left|very_close|MOVE_FORWARD|neut.lesson: [behind_left, very_close] MOVE_FORWARD → no change. Forward with behind_left bearing yielded no progress. Turn toward goal first.

far_left|far|TURN_LEFT|regress.lesson: [far_left, far] TURN_LEFT → regress -3630cm (bad). Turn increased distance — unusual, check heading.

aligned|close|STOP|neutral.lesson: [aligned, close] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still close from goal.

behind_right|far|TURN_RIGHT|progress.lesson: [behind_right, far] TURN_RIGHT → progress +217cm (good). Turn resulted in distance reduction — good realignment.

aligned|far|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [aligned, far] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -4191cm (bad). Forward motion increased distance — possible obstacle or wrong heading.

behind_right|very_close|MOVE_FORWARD|neu.lesson: [behind_right, very_close] MOVE_FORWARD → no change. Forward with behind_right bearing yielded no progress. Turn toward goal first.

slight_left|medium|MOVE_FORWARD|regress.lesson: [slight_left, medium] MOVE_FORWARD → regress -33cm (bad). Forward motion increased distance — possible obstacle or wrong heading.

slight_right|far|TURN_RIGHT|progress.lesson: [slight_right, far] TURN_RIGHT → progress +3951cm (good). Turn resulted in distance reduction — good realignment.

far_right|close|backtrack|failure_patter.lesson: Wrong direction: moved forward but distance increased by 99cm. Bearing was behind_left. Turn toward goal before moving forward.

far_left|close|oscillation|failure_patte.lesson: Oscillation detected: alternating turns without progress. Commit to one turn direction until bearing is within ±30°, then move forward.

far_right|close|STOP|neutral.lesson: [far_right, close] STOP → no change. Premature STOP — still close from goal.
